title: prunus discreta
side_effects: Prunus discreta can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high toxicity. Overexposure to the plant's compounds can also lead to allergic reactions, such as skin irritation, rashes, and respiratory problems. In severe cases, improper use of Prunus discreta can cause cardiac issues, including irregular heartbeat and cardiac arrest. Long-term exposure to the plant's toxins can also result in neurological damage, including confusion, memory loss, and seizures.
